knowledge_objects.name: Weighted Directed Graph
knowledge_objects.short_definition: A directed graph where each edge has an associated numerical weight.
knowledge_objects.source_span: A weighted directed graph assigns a numerical weight \(w(u,v)\) to each directed edge \((u,v)\).

knowledge_objects.name: Path
knowledge_objects.short_definition: A sequence of compatible directed edges.
knowledge_objects.source_span: A path is a sequence of compatible directed edges.

knowledge_objects.name: Path Cost
knowledge_objects.short_definition: The sum of edge weights along a path.
knowledge_objects.source_span: Its path cost is the sum of their edge weights

knowledge_objects.name: Path Cost Formula
knowledge_objects.short_definition: Formula for the cost of a path as the sum of edge weights.

knowledge_objects.name: Single-Source Shortest-Path Problem
knowledge_objects.short_definition: Problem of finding a minimum-cost path from a source vertex to every reachable vertex.
knowledge_objects.source_span: The single-source shortest-path problem asks for a minimum-cost path from a chosen source vertex to every reachable vertex.

knowledge_objects.name: Dijkstra's Algorithm
knowledge_objects.short_definition: Algorithm for single-source shortest paths with nonnegative edge weights using a priority queue and edge relaxation.
knowledge_objects.source_span: Dijkstra's algorithm is applied to this problem when all edge weights are nonnegative.

knowledge_objects.name: Edge Relaxation
knowledge_objects.short_definition: Update operation that reduces the tentative distance to a vertex if a shorter path is found.
knowledge_objects.source_span: it applies edge relaxation to each outgoing edge.

knowledge_objects.name: Relaxation Update
knowledge_objects.short_definition: Update rule for tentative distance d(v) as min of current d(v) and d(u)+w(u,v).

knowledge_objects.name: A* Search
knowledge_objects.short_definition: Extension of Dijkstra's algorithm that uses a heuristic function to guide exploration.
knowledge_objects.source_span: A* search extends Dijkstra's algorithm by using a heuristic function \(h(v)\) to guide which vertex is explored next.

knowledge_objects.name: Heuristic Function
knowledge_objects.short_definition: Function h(v) that estimates the cost from vertex v to the goal.
